rationale: The citing paper makes independent/interdependent self-construal a core moderator of donation responses, and explicitly claims to extend donor-identity research via this construct. The cited paper is directly about how independent vs. interdependent self-construal drives divergent consumer responses (with a reactance/constraint mechanism), so it is a plausible theory/mechanism source rather than an obvious incidental mention; the DOI match confirms it is in the reference list.
